category_sources: source_facts.description: Yet another elegant Go interpreter.
display_name_sources: Official repository at https://github.com/traefik/yaegi uses the project name Yaegi.
docs_sources: Official repository README is the primary project documentation surface.

tags_sources: Official repository README documents interpreter and REPL usage.
